title: GetResponse vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare GetResponse and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which is best for your business.
intro: GetResponse and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they cater to different types of users. GetResponse is a comprehensive marketing suite ideal for course creators and webinar hosts, while Flodesk specializes in beautiful email design for visual brands. Choosing between them depends on your priorities: all-in-one functionality versus design-focused simplicity.
choose_a_if: You need webinars, landing pages, and online course hosting in one platform
You want to start free and scale gradually as your business grows
You need advanced automation and conversion funnel tools
choose_b_if: Design and aesthetics are your top priority for email campaigns
You want unlimited subscribers on a predictable flat-rate plan
You prefer simplicity and ease of use over extensive features

faq.a: It depends on your needs. GetResponse is better for course creators, webinar hosts, and businesses needing extensive automation and marketing tools. Flodesk excels if you're a visual brand prioritizing beautiful email design and simplicity. Both have strong ratings, with Flodesk slightly higher on G2 (4.8 vs 4.2).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or Flodesk?
faq.a: GetResponse is cheaper overall, offering a free tier up to 500 subscribers and paid plans starting at $19/month. Flodesk charges a flat $38/month with no free option but includes unlimited subscribers. For small businesses or those testing email marketing, GetResponse's freemium model wins on price.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list imports and exports. Most modern email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber list as a CSV file and import it into GetResponse. You may need to recreate automation workflows and templates, but your core data transfers easily.
